title: FeiVPN Daemon Health Output
description: JSON output of `feivpn --health`. Single-line JSON to stdout, exit code 0 on success / non-0 on critical failure. Consumed by feivpnctl status / ensure-ready verification.

running.description: True if a daemon process is alive (state.json pid → kill(pid, 0) succeeds)

pid.description: PID of the running daemon (omitted if not running)

version.description: Build-time version string of the running daemon

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when daemon started

name.description: Actual interface name (e.g. utun7 on macOS)

up.description: Interface is administratively up and has IP

hijacked.description: Default route currently points through TUN

default_via.description: Current default gateway (TUN gateway when hijacked)

table.description: Routing table name (Linux: main / 200; macOS: usually 0)

hijacked.description: System resolver currently uses daemon-pushed DNS

egress_ip.description: Public IP observed when querying via the tunnel (omitted if connectivity check disabled)

checks.description: 5-point readiness summary used by feivpnctl ensure-ready
